items.title: Breaking: The New York Knicks and free agent center Andre Drummond have agreed to a one-year, $3.9 million deal, league sources told HoopsHype. During his career, Drummond has been a two-time All-Star and a four-time rebounding champion.
items.author: Michael Scotto

items.title: Can confirm that Andre Drummond is coming to the Knicks, per league sources.
items.author: James L. Edwards III
items.body_excerpt:
Can confirm that Andre Drummond is coming to the Knicks, per league sources. 

The Big Penguin provides the size, veteran experience and rebounding (statistically one of the best ever) that the Knicks need and were looking for with Robinson gone.

Also, good locker room guy.

items.title: Andre Drummond's corner three-point shooting last season was one of the more fun subplots of a Sixers season I have covered. He made a career-high three of them in Madison Square Garden, then seemed surprised that anybody was surprised. That is now his home arena.
items.author: Adam Aaronson

items.title: Andre Drummond is the last Sixers FA standing with any form of Bird rights.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt:
Andre Drummond is the last Sixers FA standing with any form of Bird rights.

Philly could’ve very well matched this and stayed below the hard cap.

Only questions now are whether they use the remainder of their MLE money or the bi-annual, or just sign minimums.

items.title: Andre Drummond: I'm not willing to play for less than my worth
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt: Andre Drummond: I'm not willing to play for less than my worth HoopsHype

items.title: Andre Drummond reflects on being a free agent:
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt:
Andre Drummond reflects on being a free agent:
"It's a dream come true for me [playing in the NBA]. But I'm also not willing to play for less than my worth." 

"I did that once...and I think it really killed my value, because I'm still moving like I'm in my mid-20s."

www.youtube.com/watch?v=Biwm...
